title: luhtech-agents-comms Slack Broadcast (SR Repo v1)
description: Builds .github/workflows/slack-broadcast.yml in schema-registry repo. Workflow broadcasts SR PR open/merge events and pushes to schemas/_instances/** to #luhtech-agents-comms channel (ID C0B7EPFCA85). Uses SLACK_BOT_TOKEN GitHub org-level secret sourced from BW item slack-agent-comms-bot in active vault luhtechnology.com. SR-repo only in v1 per three-layer execution model — EB mirror is separate EB-chat deliverable. First broadcast test = this deliverable's own merge event. Establishes infrastructure that promotes RULE-CROSS-CHAT-SURFACE-NOTIFICATION-1 and RULE-L4-OVERRIDE-SUBSTRATE-ARTIFACT-1 automation paths. Scope (b) per Erik direction 2026-06-01.

outputs.description: .github/workflows/slack-broadcast.yml — GHA workflow broadcasting SR PR open/merge events and pushes to schemas/_instances/** to #luhtech-agents-comms channel.
acceptanceCriteria: Triggers on pull_request (opened, closed, reopened) and push to main with paths schemas/_instances/**
Posts structured message to channel C0B7EPFCA85 via Slack chat.postMessage API
Message contains: event type, PR title/number/url or commit/files, actor, timestamp
Loop prevention: skips when commit message contains [skip-broadcast]

outputs.description: GitHub org-level secret SLACK_BOT_TOKEN set via gh secret set --org sourcing BW item slack-agent-comms-bot.
acceptanceCriteria: Secret set at repo level (luh-tech/schema-registry) — org-level fallback per dispatch; admin:org scope absent from current token
Secret value never echoed in chat or terminal (pipe-not-echo per memory #9)
Secret access confirmed by workflow run on this deliverable's PR
EB mirror must set its own SLACK_BOT_TOKEN from same BW item when EB-chat authors workflow

outputs.description: Prospective deliverable spec — S4 → S5 → S6 across dispatch; S7/S8 post-merge.
First broadcast post in channel C0B7EPFCA85 from this deliverable's merge event. End-to-end verification.
acceptanceCriteria: Broadcast attributable to this PR's merge

outputs.description: Post-merge Slack canvas to EB-chat with the workflow pattern for mirroring in EB repo.
acceptanceCriteria: Canvas published to Slack channel or DM
Canvas contains workflow YAML content + secret setup instructions + GitHub-org-secret-already-exists note
EB-chat can mirror in their session without further design questions

preMerge: BW preflight: vault unlocked, slack-agent-comms-bot item reachable (8-char prefix c9a3e672, type Login)
Deliverable spec validates against deliverable.schema.json v1.1.0
postMerge: First broadcast message visible in #luhtech-agents-comms channel
Subsequent SR PR events trigger broadcasts automatically

transitions.trigger: Dispatch authored after FU-D-5f close (6d9970a). All manual prerequisites complete: channel exists, bot installed, BW item stored. BW sync run. Scope (b) per Erik direction.
BW preflight clean (prefix xoxb-105); workflow authored; secret distributed at repo-level (org-level failed: admin:org scope absent; fallback per dispatch instructions)
Squash merge to main via MERGE PR 84

Post-merge: workflow active on main, SLACK_BOT_TOKEN set at repo level, broadcast fired on PR-open and PR-merged events (both conclusion=success). First messages in #luhtech-agents-comms channel confirmed.

notes: Portfolio infrastructure deliverable. Does not close an FU; builds the automation path that future deliverables will reference in evidenceClass to promote RULE-CROSS-CHAT-SURFACE-NOTIFICATION-1 and RULE-L4-OVERRIDE-SUBSTRATE-ARTIFACT-1. First end-to-end use of Slack bot infrastructure across LuhTech portfolio. EB mirror is separate EB-chat work per three-layer model — SR cannot reach into EB repo. Cross-chat-relay canvas at OUT-5 hands the pattern to EB-chat. Channel: C0B7EPFCA85 (#luhtech-agents-comms, private). Secret: SLACK_BOT_TOKEN at GitHub org level so EB workflow can reuse same secret. v1 scope (b) = PR events + schemas/_instances/** pushes. Loop prevention via [skip-broadcast] commit message marker.
